title: Community node not appearing in available nodes list
symptom: After installing a community node, it does not appear in the list of available nodes when trying to add it to a workflow.
applies_when: Using the web GUI to add nodes
not_this_if: Node appears in the list after installation
Using a different version of n8n
root_cause: Sometimes, the browser cache may prevent the updated list of nodes from being displayed correctly after installation. This can lead to confusion as the node appears to be installed but is not accessible.
fix_steps: Check the list of available nodes again
agent_instruction: Clear the browser cache and refresh the n8n interface to see the installed community node.
